istarget.description: C,L,R represent central, left or right target, 0 means no target

stimC.description: stimulus number of central image (-1 is no image)

stimL.description: stimulus number of left image (-1 is no image)

stimR.description: stimulus number of right image (-1 is no image)

stimnameL.description: name of stimulus on left (or no image)

stimnameR.description: name of stimulus on right (or no image)

stimnameC.description: name of stimulus central (or no image)

response.description: 0 when no response, or 1 for response

rt.description: time of response, but this isn't accurate

correct.description: correct response to a target (1) or not (0)

time_stimon.description: stimulus onset time (s), relative to experiment start

time_stimoff.description: stimulus offset time (s), relative to experiment start
